auth.emailVerificationDesc: We've sent a verification code to your email. Please enter the code to proceed.
auth.vpsServiceLaunchAnnouncement: Starting from the 1st of January 2025, we have officially rolled out the VPS service, making it available for public beta testing to allow users to explore its features.
auth.smtpPortsRestrictionNotice: You are aware that SMTP ports 25, 465, and 587 are currently restricted on the VPS service.
auth.eligibilityCountriesNotice: You must be a resident of one of the following countries or regions in order to be eligible: Singapore, Australia, Brunei, Cambodia, China, Hong Kong, Indonesia, Japan, South Korea, Laos, Macao, Malaysia, New Zealand, the Philippines, Taiwan, Thailand, Timor-Leste, or Vietnam.
auth.agreeToTermsText: You must agree to the terms

home.eligibilityCheckError: Failed to check eligibility. Please try again later.

serverSection.noServerMessage:

noTopUpModal.title: Maximum Top-Up Limit Reached
noTopUpModal.message: You've reached the maximum top-up amount allowed. Please contact support for assistance.

maximumServerReachedModal.title: Maximum server reached
maximumServerReachedModal.message: You've reached the maximum number of servers allowed. For assistance or inquiries, please contact support.

noTopUpModal.title: Maximum Top-Up Limit Reached
noTopUpModal.message: You've reached the maximum top-up amount allowed. Please contact support for assistance.

topUpSuccessModal.title: Top Up Success!
topUpSuccessModal.message: Thank you for the top up. You may view the transaction detail under 'Transaction History' and balance detail under 'Points History'

paymentFailedModal.title: Payment unsuccessful
paymentFailedModal.message: Please retry payment or select a different payment method.

activity.noSearchResultDescription:
There is no record of the search.
Please try with a different search key.

points.noRecord:
There is no record of transaction history.
Please try again with a different search key.

serverList.title: My VPS List
serverList.noActiveServerDescription:
There is no record of active server.
Go to Home & create server.

createVps.note: * No excess usage charge, ensure customers have worry free usage. Fair use policy applied.

maximumServerReachedModal.title: Maximum server reached
maximumServerReachedModal.message: You've reached the maximum number of servers allowed. For assistance or inquiries, please contact support.

terminateServer.title: Terminating server?
terminateServer.description: You are about to terminate your server. This action is irreversible and will result in the loss of all data and configurations associated with this server. Please ensure you have backed up any important information before proceeding.

terminatedServer.title: Terminating Server
terminatedServer.description: We're processing your request to terminate the server (Server ID: {serverId}). You'll receive a notification in your inbox once the process is complete. Thank you for your patience!

powerOn.title: Power on server?
powerOn.description: Do you want to power on the server? It may take a few moments for all services to become available.

powerOff.title: Power off server?
powerOff.description: Are you sure you want to power off the server? This will stop all services and disconnect active users.

reboot.title: Reboot server?
reboot.description: This will cause a brief downtime, and any unsaved data may be lost. Please save your work before proceeding.

start.title: Power on server?
start.description: Do you want to power on the server? It may take a few moments for all services to become available.

stop.title: Graceful shutdown server?
stop.description: The server will shut down gracefully. You'll need to start it again to restore services.

disableRescueMode.title: Disable rescue mode?
disableRescueMode.description: Disabling Rescue Mode will power off your server. You will need to manually power it back on to restore service. Please confirm to proceed.

enableRescueMode.title: Enable rescue mode?
enableRescueMode.description: This action allows for recovery and troubleshooting but may effect your server's current state.

disableConsoleAccess.title: Disable console access?
disableConsoleAccess.description: Disabling Console Access will restrict direct server management through the console. Please confirm to proceed.

enableConsoleAccess.title: Enable console access?
enableConsoleAccess.description: This action provides you with low-level control and can affact the server's performance and security. Please confirm to proceed.

emailVerification.title: Verify to Terminate Server
emailVerification.description: A One-Time Password (OTP) has been sent to your email address {email}. If you don't see it in your inbox, please check your junk or spam folder.

serverRedirect.heading: New Server Created
serverRedirect.message1: Your server has been successfully created.
serverRedirect.message2: You will be redirecting to your server in a moment...

transaction.emptyStateDescription:
There is no record of the search.
Please try with a different search key.

support.welcomeMessage: Welcome! Feel free to leave us a message, and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

accountInformation.tipsMessage: Tips: Account information will be used for billing purposes.

loginSecurity.passwordUpdateDescription: You're all set! Please enter your new password to continue.
loginSecurity.otpSent: A One-Time Password (OTP) has been sent to your new email address. If you don't see it in your inbox, please check your junk or spam folder.
loginSecurity.tipsBiometric: Tips: Allow biometric log in for better security and faster log in.

insufficientPointReminder.label: Zero/Negative Points Alert
insufficientPointReminder.title: Zero/Negative points alert
insufficientPointReminder.description: Notify me if my point balance is insufficient for next statement.

loginAttempt.label: Log In Attempts
loginAttempt.title: Log in attempts
loginAttempt.description: Notify me when successful login from different devices.

unAuthorisedAccessAlert.label: Unauthorized Access Alerts
unAuthorisedAccessAlert.title: Unauthorized access alerts
unAuthorisedAccessAlert.description: Notify me when 3 consecutive log in failure

cardDetails.deleteCardDescription: After deleting this card, you will no longer be able to make transactions with it.

editAddressModal.acknowledgeText: I acknowledge that the information provided is correct and that I understand the local tax exemption laws applicable to my selected country.

deleteAccountModal.title: Delete Account?
deleteAccountModal.message: By deleting your account, any remaining points will be forfeited and are non-refundable. Would you like to proceed?

vpsDetailsModal.title: VPS Details
vpsDetailsModal.note: * No need to worry about excess usage charge, ensure customers have worry-free usage. Fair use policy applied.

forgotPasswordModal.otpInfo: We will send you a temporary One Time Password (OTP) to reset the password.

resetPasswordOtpModal.title: Enter OTP
resetPasswordOtpModal.description: A One-Time Password (OTP) has been sent to your email address with {email}. If you don’t see it in your inbox, please check your junk or spam folder.
resetPasswordOtpModal.resendText: Didn't receive the code? Resend in {countdown}s

setNewPasswordModal.title: Set New Password
setNewPasswordModal.description: Please create a new password for your account. Make sure it's strong and secure.

emailVerificationModal.title: Email Verification
emailVerificationModal.didNotReceiveCode: Didn't receive the code? Resend in {countdown}s

completeProfileModal.title: Complete your profile setting
completeProfileModal.description: You are ONE step away from completing your sign up! To enhance your user experience, let us know you better.
